Attestation Report: tinfoil_v3_direct / gemma4-31b

  Hardware:      amd-sev-snp
  Nonce source:  client

Tier 1: Core Attestation
  ✓ nonce_match                nonce matches (64 hex chars) (client-supplied)  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_quote_present          SEV-SNP report present (1184 bytes)  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_quote_structure        valid SEV-SNP report, measurement: bebbe5cc7b3c2f4e...  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_cert_chain             certificate chain valid (AMD root CA)  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_quote_signature        SEV-SNP report signature verified  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_debug_disabled         debug bit is 0 (production guest)  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ tee_measurement            Sigstore code measurement mismatch: SEV-SNP measurement mismatch: code=a24833cb430ca68bd21055c15956db05165447f272f91b6d1a622f30381d3d780bd728a5f917630612fdb7d03bf55915 enclave=bebbe5cc7b3c2f4eabfc2015416d253080f304fe66bb5265eadd49e42c0e4e810f4dd26a0a397b81536562ca4ef291e0  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_hardware_config        SEV-SNP guest policy valid (policy=0x0000000000030000)  [ENFORCED]
  - tee_boot_config            SEV-SNP has no boot config registers (no RTMR equivalent)  [ALLOWED]
  ✓ signing_key_present        enclave pubkey present (d8bcf2c5dc...)  [ENFORCED]

Tier 2: Binding & Crypto
  ✓ tee_reportdata_binding     v3: reportdata_hash verified, nonce_bound=true, gpu_bound=false  [ENFORCED]
  - intel_pcs_collateral       SEV-SNP uses AMD KDS; Intel PCS not applicable  [ALLOWED]
  ✓ tee_tcb_current            SEV-SNP TCB meets minimums (bl=0x0a tee=0x00 snp=0x17 ucode=0x54)  [ENFORCED]
  ✓ tee_tcb_not_revoked        SEV-SNP TCB validated against minimum thresholds  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ nvidia_payload_present     nvidia_payload field is absent from attestation response  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ nvidia_signature           no NVIDIA payload to verify (enforced)  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ nvidia_claims              no NVIDIA payload to check (enforced)  [ENFORCED]
  — nvidia_nonce_client_bound  Tinfoil binds GPU nonce freshness via REPORTDATA hash chain, not direct SPDM nonce
  — nvidia_nras_verified       NRAS is an EAT-JWT cloud service; Tinfoil uses direct SPDM verification
  ✓ e2ee_capable               X25519 HPKE public key valid (32 bytes); EHBP E2EE key exchange possible  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ e2ee_usable                E2EE not configured for this provider (enforced)  [ENFORCED]

Tier 3: Supply Chain & Channel Integrity
  ✓ tls_key_binding            TLS certificate SPKI bound to attestation (ac150e6bcff677a3...)  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ cpu_gpu_chain              CPU-GPU attestation not bound  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ nvswitch_binding           no GPU evidence; NVSwitch check not applicable (enforced)  [ENFORCED]
  ✗ measured_model_weights     no model weight hashes  [ENFORCED]
  — build_transparency_log     Tinfoil uses Sigstore DSSE, not Rekor compose provenance
  ✗ cpu_id_registry            no CPU ID registry check  [ALLOWED]
  — compose_binding            Tinfoil uses Sigstore DSSE, not compose-based binding
  — sigstore_verification      Tinfoil uses Sigstore DSSE, not per-image cosign verification
  ✗ sigstore_code_verified     code measurement mismatch: SEV-SNP measurement mismatch: code=a24833cb430ca68bd21055c15956db05165447f272f91b6d1a622f30381d3d780bd728a5f917630612fdb7d03bf55915 enclave=bebbe5cc7b3c2f4eabfc2015416d253080f304fe66bb5265eadd49e42c0e4e810f4dd26a0a397b81536562ca4ef291e0  [ENFORCED]

Score: 13/25 passed, 2 skipped, 10 failed (9 enforced, 1 allowed), 6 n/a

Run 'teep help tiers' for scoring or 'teep help factors' for details.
